## Description
Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed (if applicable).
If this is a new component, provide a brief description of its visual behavior.

## Checklist:
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) file.
- [ ] I have read and followed the strict architectural mandates in [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md).
- [ ] **No Frameworks:** I have NOT used React, Vue, Svelte, Tailwind, etc. This is purely Vanilla JS, HTML, and CSS.
- [ ] **Animation Engine:** All animations are powered exclusively by `GSAP`.
- [ ] My code generates NO console errors.
- [ ] The component is fully responsive (looks good on mobile screens).
- [ ] The component code is easily copy-pasteable (separated HTML, CSS, JS).

## Screenshots / Video
(Please attach a video or screenshot of the component in action, especially if it's a new UI element)
